testcase.name: startHomepage

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'CHMB135994', ip: '192.168.0.101' Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '15.5', java.version: '23.0.1' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {appium:appActivity: com.focusbrands.appcuisine...., appium:appPackage: com.punchh.moes, appium:automationName: UIAutomator2, appium:deviceName: Galaxy S22 Ultra, appium:newCommandTimeout: 600, appium:noReset: false, appium:platformVersion: 15, platformName: ANDROID}]}] Capabilities {appium:appActivity: com.focusbrands.appcuisine...., appium:appPackage: com.punchh.moes, appium:automationName: UIAutomator2, appium:deviceName: Galaxy S22 Ultra, appium:newCommandTimeout: 600, appium:noReset: false, appium:platformVersion: 15, platformName: ANDROID}
